notes: Brand new look — Legion now has its own dark themed window, no more standard Windows titlebar|Cleaner layout with separate Chat, Build, and Edit tabs|New file tree sidebar for browsing your workspace files|New Downloads menu with Models and Addons|Model browser — see available Ollama models, click one to download it with a live progress bar|Models you already have are marked as installed|Addons coming soon|Chat history is now saved and restored between sessions|Connection status light shows when Ollama is ready|Faster startup|New installer with the same Legion look|Lots of stability fixes and general improvements
